title: Parrot's Skin Changer
body:
## **ABOUT:**
Parrot's Skin Changer adds skin customization to Minecraft Beta 1.7.3. This mod allows you to change your player skin directly in-game without needing to restart your client.

Inspired by [SkinsRestorer](https://modrinth.com/plugin/skinsrestorer)

## **COMPATIBILITY:**
Minecraft: Beta 1.7.3

Requires: [StationAPI](https://modrinth.com/mod/stationapi) and Babric Loader

Optional: [RetroAuth](https://modrinth.com/mod/retroauth) for modern skins
